blended.narrative: Mt. Hood Meadows is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.1 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 10,775 ft. Looking ahead, 42 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 4" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Wednesday: 3.9" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 8" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 7" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 11.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 43".
